'''鈭歾h-r-w-v''' ('''kazharwevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brain|brain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brain|brain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-r-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazharwevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharwevoko|thizharwevoko]] || [[word:jizharwevoko|jizharwevoko]] || [[word:shizharwevoko|shizharwevoko]] || [[word:kizharwevoko|kizharwevoko]]
